name: Sister's Shroud
description:
Passive: Veiled

When falling below %hp_threshold%%% HP, gain %evasion_max%%% evasion for %max_duration% seconds. While active, dodging an attack decreases the evasion bonus by %evasion_loss%%% of its current value.

Passive: Last Caress

Veiled cooldown is only reset if the wearer dies or kills an enemy hero.
notes: Does not trigger from damage by non-player controlled creeps
lore: A pall that draped the sarcophagus of the First Sister.
